weekly picks (Mar 2 week 2026)

Posted on March 9, 2026 in 2026mar,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 2nd week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

03/09

  1. s41467-026-70405-3 High-voltage and stable co-free LiNiO2 positive electrode for sulfide-based all-solid-state batteries (Nature Communications)

  2. s41598-026-35652-w Innovative solutions for lossy nonlinear transmission lines model using a modified extended mapping approach with fractional effects (Scientific Reports)

  3. 2603.05606v1 Evolution of the Superfluid Density in Infinite-Layer Nickelates (arXiv)

  4. 2603.05610v1 Ultra-slow orbital and spin dynamics in an electrically tunable quantum dot molecule (arXiv)

  5. 2603.05613v1 Identification of an Unreported Structure Type in GdNiSn4 and Its Implications for Materials Prediction (arXiv)

  6. 2603.05652v1 Physics of active polymers: scaling analysis via a compounding formula (arXiv)

  7. 2603.05668v1 Operational Emergence of a Global Phase under Time-Dependent Coupling in Oscillator Networks (arXiv)

  8. 2603.05707v1 The toric code under antiferromagnetic isotropic Heisenberg interactions (arXiv)

  9. 2603.05714v1 Charge-ordered states in twisted MoTe$_2$ (arXiv)

  10. 2603.05715v1 Coexisting Paramagnetic Spins and Long-Range Magnetic Order in Ba$4$(Ru${0.92}$Ir${0.08}$)$_3$O${10}$ (arXiv)

  11. 2603.05717v1 The Evolution of Magnetism in a Thin Film Pyrochlore Ferromagnetic Insulator (arXiv)

  12. 2603.05734v1 Magnetoelastic signatures of conical state and charge density waves in antiferromagnetic FeGe (arXiv)

  13. 2603.05755v1 Exchange anisotropy-driven noncollinear magnetism and magnetic transitions in MnTiO3 ilmenite (arXiv)

  14. 2603.05759v1 Moir'e-induced symmetry breaking of charge order in van der Waals heterostructures (arXiv)

  15. 2603.05770v1 Efficiently gate-tunable ferromagnetism in ferromagnetic semiconductor-Dirac semimetal p-n heterojunctions (arXiv)

  16. 2603.05816v1 Influence of Hopping Integrals and Spin-Orbit Coupling on Quantum Oscillations in Kagome Lattices (arXiv)

  18. 2603.05866v1 Electrically tunable circular photocurrent via local-field induced symmetry breaking at a metal-MoTe2 interface (arXiv)

  19. 2603.05901v1 Chirality Breaking of Majorana Edge Modes Induced by Chemical Potential Shifts (arXiv)

  21. 2603.05948v1 Nonlinear magnetoelastic wave dynamics and field tunable soliton excitations in hexagonal multiferroic media (arXiv)

  23. 2603.05994v1 Critical dynamics govern the evolution of political regimes (arXiv)

  24. 2603.06011v1 Spectra-Scope : A toolkit for automated and interpretable characterization of material properties from spectral data (arXiv)

  27. 2603.06070v1 Absolute negative mobility in a one-dimensional overdamped system driven by active fluctuations (arXiv)

  28. 2603.06096v1 Long-Lived Interlayer Excitons and Type-II Band Alignment in Janus MoTe2/CrSBr van der Waals Heterostructures (arXiv)

  29. 2603.06102v1 Spectral study of the pseudogap in unitary Fermi gases (arXiv)

  30. 2603.06108v1 Stochastic resonance in higher-order networks driven by colored noise (arXiv)

  32. 2603.06115v1 Phase-resolved imaging of coherent phonon-magnon coupling (arXiv)

  35. 2603.06144v1 Electric field switching of chiral phonons (arXiv)

  36. 2603.06146v1 Validation of constant mean free path and relaxation time approximations for metal resistivity: explicit treatment of electron-phonon interactions (arXiv)
